compiled_state.title: As an agent, diff hash computation remains stable during rebase operations
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add REBASE_HEAD-aware incoming-only file exclusion to compute-diff-hash.sh, symmetric with the existing MERGE_HEAD handling.
**Why**: Without symmetric hash computation, the hash recorded at review time differs from the hash at commit time during rebase, causing the review gate to block with hash mismatches even when no worktree code changed.
**Scope**:
- IN: REBASE_HEAD detection in compute-diff-hash.sh, incoming-only file exclusion from diff hash, fail-open fallback, bash tests for hash stability
- OUT: capture-review-diff.sh filtering (covered by sibling story). Implementation approach for shared vs inline detection left to implementation planning.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, compute-diff-hash.sh produces a stable hash during rebase by excluding incoming-only files from the diff
  <- Satisfies: "compute-diff-hash.sh produces a stable hash during rebase by excluding incoming-only files from the diff, consistent with its existing merge-commit behavior"
- When this story is complete, the hash computed at review time matches the hash computed at commit time for the same worktree changes during rebase
- When this story is complete, bash tests verify hash stability across rebase boundaries
  <- Satisfies: "Test suite includes bash tests that simulate REBASE_HEAD state"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Must fail open on missing onto file or unresolvable ref
- [Reliability] Must use git rev-parse --git-dir for per-worktree state resolution
- [Testing] Must mirror existing MERGE_HEAD hash test patterns
- [Maintainability] Follow MERGE_HEAD pattern closely for 5ee9-143e compatibility
- [Implicit Shared State] capture-review-diff.sh has identical MERGE_HEAD filtering; if compute-diff-hash.sh gains REBASE_HEAD filtering but capture-review-diff.sh does not, hash symmetry breaks (covered by sibling story)

comments.body: Story complete: REBASE_HEAD filtering in compute-diff-hash.sh implemented. Hash stable during rebase. Both tasks closed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
